title: arthraxon lanceolatus var. villosus
intro: Arthraxon lanceolatus var. villosus, also known as hairy arthraxon, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Arthraxon lanceolatus var. villosus include reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and treating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or used as a powder to be taken internally for its medicinal benefits.
